user.title: DSC 5401 serial port
user.description: Connect to the DSC PC5401 RS-232 interface board. Use a local USB serial port, an rfc2217:// URL, or an esphome:// serial proxy.

link.title: Link to AlarmDecoder
link.description: Optionally pick an existing alarm_control_panel entity (typically the one created by the AlarmDecoder integration). DSC 5401 trouble and user-attribution entities will be attached to the same device card. Leave blank to use a standalone device.

error.cannot_connect: Could not open the serial port.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one DSC 5401 instance is supported.

init.title: DSC 5401 options
init.description:
User codes and partitions can be given friendly names. Enter one `code: name` pair per line, e.g.

```
0040: Gaetan
0001: Master
```

set_clock.name: Set panel clock
set_clock.description: Sync the DSC panel's internal clock to Home Assistant's current local time.

send_command.name: Send raw command
send_command.description: Send a raw DSC API command to the panel. Advanced use only.

data.name: Command data
data.description: Optional argument string for the command.

clear_duress.name: Clear duress alarm
clear_duress.description: Manually clear the latched Duress Alarm binary_sensor.
